sections.paragraph:
- Original: τοῦτο

- Transliteration: Touto

- Phonetic: too'-to

- Definition:

1. that (thing), this (thing)

- Origin: neuter singular nominative or accusative case of G3778

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: Neuter singular nomitive or accusative of G3778; that thing: - here [-unto] it partly self [-same] so that (intent) the same there [-fore -unto] this thus where [-fore].
